name: The Broken Dreams Correctional Center
description:
An erotic text based adventure game about being a prisoner in space. Put your inmate class/color and crime in the chat memory.

.9 temperature and 600 token limit seems to give decent results.

My first bot. I tried to recreate the game as accurately as I could for an authentic experience of torturing the prison and sending it off the rails, so that ended up with the permanent tokens being a bit over 2k, so it's probably going to be wonky and need messages to be regenerated a bit. It does describe what you're doing a bit in the greeting, but it shouldn't affect the narration too much. (I hope)

BDCC was created by RahiMew.
creator: JC Denton
